历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 8431 → 9033 → 8895 → 9750 → 15220, showing a continuous backward trend, especially in 2025 with a significant drop of about 5470 positions compared to 2024, possibly related to adjustments in the new college entrance examination subject selection and major group settings; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 15220; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi Province was 79 in 2021, 80 in 2022, 77 in 2023, 79 in 2024, 95 in 2025, and 98 in 2026, with an increase of 3 students in 2026 compared to 2025 (an increase of about 3.2%), a moderate expansion that slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked about 40th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 38–40 range in recent years, belonging to the core 985 tier; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to humanities events such as master's graduates thanking the security department in their acknowledgments for allowing a waste-picking elderly person to enter the campus, enhancing the university's image; Douyin popularity ranking 53rd (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; Grassland Science A+, Ecology A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-, with a total of 5 A- and above disciplines, with Grassland Science and Ecology at the national top level, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Grassland Science (Base Class), Ecology, Chemistry, and Geography Science, attracting some applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended or relatively hot in 2026, matching enrollment majors like Electronic Information and Computer Science at this university, potentially increasing competition in related major groups; the total number of students taking the 2026 Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is about 474,900, slightly higher than 2025 (History Category + Physics Category total about 472,480), with Physics Category estimated at about 267,800 (an increase of about 1,400 compared to 2025), showing a small growth in the candidate pool; Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou, Gansu Province, far from Jiangxi Province, and the geographical preference for cross-province study may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; the university's enrollment plan in Jiangxi Province accounts for a small proportion (about 98 students), which is a normal scale for cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the small enrollment expansion in 2026 (3 students), and the slight increase in Physics Category candidates, supply and demand are basically balanced; after the significant ranking drop in 2025, the ranking is expected to continue to slightly decline in 2026 due to the expansion effect, but the positive reputation warming and hot major popularity will limit the decline; the predicted minimum ranking is about 15,458, with a range of 14,958–15,958.

- Physics (including Base Class/Quantum Technology Innovation Class)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 15,458, range 14,958–15,958. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction (such as Clinical Medicine, Chemistry, Atmospheric Science, etc.), Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, etc.) as reach choices, and Tier 3 majors (Business Administration, Economics, etc.) as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<14,958) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; those with rankings near the lower limit (>15,958) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1458 → 1595 → 1582 → 1620 → 1941, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift was about 359 places, and in 2025 compared to 2024, the backward shift was about 321 places, with the speed of backward shift accelerating. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1941. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province for History Category was 13 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 18 in 2025, and 20 in 2026. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 2 students (an increase of about 11.1%), which is a relatively large expansion and has a certain alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 40th, with recent rankings stable in the 38–40 range, belonging to the mid-tier 985 level. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly positive, mainly due to incidents such as a master's graduate thanking the security department in their acknowledgments for tacitly allowing a scrap collector to enter the campus, which enhanced the university's image. Douyin popularity ranking is 53rd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting a slight increase in application attention. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Grassland Science A+, Ecology A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above. Among the History Category enrollment majors, Chinese Language and Literature, Law, History, etc., although not directly corresponding to the above A-class disciplines, Lanzhou University, as a comprehensive 985 university, has a solid liberal arts foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the social popularity of Law is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended/relatively hot, Teacher Training/Education is divided and wait-and-see. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is approximately 474,900, with History Category estimated at about 207,100 (an increase of about 1,000 compared to 2025), showing a slight increase in candidate scale. Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, which is relatively far from Jiangxi Province. The regional preference for cross-province study may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' willingness to apply. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi Province is only 20 students, which is a small-scale enrollment, making ranking fluctuations relatively sensitive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the expansion of 2 students in 2026 (an increase of 11.1%), and the slight increase in History Category candidates, the expansion rate is greater than the candidate increase rate, theoretically leading to a slight easing of competition. However, driven by the positive reputation of the university and the popularity of liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, the application heat may rise slightly, offsetting part of the expansion effect. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2080, with a range of 1768–2392.
